title: Type I-B office tower above the 75 ft high-rise threshold
notes: Tests IBC 403 high-rise threshold (warn -> needs_review) and that a tall but in-limit building does not false-fail area/stories.
plan_text:
CODE ANALYSIS
Occupancy: B
Type: I-B
Stories: 11
Height: 160 ft
Fully sprinklered NFPA 13. Fire alarm NFPA 72. Smoke control and standby power provided. Voice alarm.
Accessible parking, accessible route, ADA restroom, braille signage.
IECC energy code. Ventilation outdoor air per IMC 403. Panic hardware. 3000 A service. CALGreen low-flow fixtures. Construction waste management plan.
